title: jacobaea minuta
intro: Jacobaea minuta, also known as dwarf ragwort, is a small, annual or biennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Jacobaea minuta include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Jacobaea minuta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues.
